name: Coffee Pots De Creme
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------PRALINE----------------------------------
2 tbsp Slivered almonds
1/4 cup Sugar
1 tbsp Water
Pour cream into saucepan, bring to a boil, add coffee beans. Reduce heat.
Simmer gently for 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand for 30 minutes,
strain.
Whisk egg yolks, sugar, and Tia Maria in a bowl. Whisk in the coffee-flavored
cream. Pour mixture into individual ovenproof dishes (1/3 cup capacity).
Place dishes in a lamington pan. Pour enough hot water into the pan to come
half way up the side of the dishes. Cover with foil or lids, bake in a slow
oven for about 20 minutes or until mixture is just set. Cool and refrigerate
before serving.
PRALINE: Place almonds in a saucepan. Stir constantly over heat until
lightly browned. Spread evenly on a lightly greased oven tray. Combine sugar
and water in the same pan. Stir constantly over heat without boiling until
sugar is dissolved. Boil rapidly without stirring until the mixture turns
golden brown. Remove from heat, allow bubbles to subside, pour over almonds,
chop roughly when set.
Decorate pots de creme with extra whipped cream and praline.
